title: HaWare 16 Pieces Cutlery Set, Stainless Steel Hammered Flatware Silverware for Home/Office/Party/Camping, Knife Fork Spoon Eating Utensils Service for 4, Mirror Polish & Dishwasher Safe
features: 【Hammered Design】Combine with both classic and contemporary aesthetics, Elegant and timeless design with hammered handle, Smooth surface and mirror polished make these versatile utensils always remain glossy, Good match to any style dinnerware. (Warm reminder: For a better experience, our teaspoons are now designed in a uniform size of 15cm)

【18/0 Durable Material】The 16-piece sets are made of FOOD GRADE 18/0 stainless steel which is Healthy for both adults and children, Sturdy enough to not band easily, Rust resistant and durable for years to come. (Notice: Dishwasher Safe, the knife and fork set can be last long time with your proper care)

【Nice weight & Good Grip】Come with nice weight, not too heavy and not flimsy, forget the silverware and enjoy dinner, perfect balanced when holding in hands. Soft curve handle without sharp spots. Unique yet extraordinary, Sleek edge handle designed to provide firm grip for children and adults alike.

【16 Pieces Serve For 4】HaWare 16pcs includes (4) steak knives, (4) dinner forks, (4) dinner spoons, and (4) dessert spoon, No need to be left with a mix matched set of flatware. It is a Must for a fully equipped kitchen, Enjoy a great dinner with your family or friends.

【Dishwasher Safe】 Dishwasher safe and long lasting under proper care ( Note：Do not hesitate to contact us when you have any concerns. We'll provide the best solution for you )Perfect for those moving into their first apartment or a couple building their home together, ideal for family, party, office, entertainment, restaurant, hotel, camping and more. Also as a terrific gift for Christmas, wedding, birthday, housewarming.
description: Product Description HaWare is devoted to Home & Kitchen product since 1999, online sale is the first try, commercial lines of products, ranging from kitchen utensils to food preparation supplies, are used by all food service and hospitality industry experts worldwide.Modern looking with no frills decor on this silverware set. Smooth surface and mirror polished make these utensils practical. Pay Homage To Modern & Traditional Aesthetic Everyone wants a flatware set that will match with their personal style or their dining room style. In the market, most of the time you find - zigzag, golden prints/lines, etc. but the hammered pattern is different, with a classic yet fashion forward design with rounded edges along with bright mirror polish , these elegant silverware effortlessly uplift the visual appeal of your dinner table. More Details Durability 18/0 Stainless steel （304 food grade） with a thin and strong chromium oxide film (protective film) formed on the surface to prevent the oxygen atoms from continuing to oxidize, which can make to last the test of time. Mirror Finished Smooth surface and mirror polished make these versatile utensils always remain glossy, Match well with most tableware dinnerware schemes. Pretty hammered handle won’t peel off after heavy use, Your proper care can make this stainless steel cutlery set always look as good as new Serrated Sharp Blades Solid constructed by 420 hard stainless steel to ensure sharpness. Serrated blades are sharp enough to cut meat and steak. Sharp than gengeral butter knives. Sturdy Thanks to a nice weight, HaWare cutlery set with density 7.75g/cm3 （430 stainless steel）, heavy duty but not flimsy, they won’t bend or wrap as time as perfect balanced when holding in hands
